gazette: the Official Gazette, nr.32545, dated 13th of May .
title: The list of goods within the scope of the agreement between Turkey and Qatar has been expanded
bodyHtml:
On May 13, 2024, the decision regarding the approval of the notes amending the Trade and Economic Partnership Agreement between the Government of the Republic of Turkey and the Government of the State of Qatar (Decision Number: 8448) was published in the Official Gazette, numbered 32545, and published in the first repeat.

With this decision, the list of goods within the scope of the agreement between Turkey and Qatar was expanded in accordance with the mutual notes exchanged in 2023.

Upon the entry into force of the agreement, customs duties will be zeroed for the goods listed in the relevant appendices.

The preferential origin of the goods covered by the agreement will be proven with an EUR.1 Movement Certificate or an invoice declaration (which can be made by an Approved Exporter for amounts over 6000 EUR).

The lists of goods for which both countries grant tax concessions and rules of origin can be checked from the following page ranges:

-List of goods for which import duties are zeroed in Turkey (pp.1135-1280 and 1407-1444)

-List of goods for which import duties are zeroed in Qatar (pp. 1281-1313 and 1445-1516).

Additionally, the protocol of origin (pp. 1042-1073) and rules of origin (pp.1074-1128) are available.

Click here for the Decision regarding the Approval of the Notes Amending the Trade and Economic Partnership Agreement between the Government of the Republic of Turkey and the Government of the State of Qatar (Decision Number: 8448).
